Did the Pope use AI to write about the dangers of AI?
items.description: It's possible that AI was used to write parts of Pope Leo XIV's latest encyclical about AI's impact on humanity. An analysis by Linch Zhang posted on the forum LessWrong found certain paragraphs of Magnifica Humanitas to be between 40 percent and 100 percent written by AI, according to the popular A...

items.title: NASA’s permanent Moon base plans start with three missions this year
items.description: On Tuesday, NASA announced several upcoming lunar missions to the Moon's South Pole region. items.title: Memory V re-creates the Memorymoog without the massive headaches or price tag
